Defendants' Motion To Augment Expert Witness List
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Atty. ANNA A. LEONG, ESQ. of Law Offices of Anna Leong (Tel: 415-861-0727) appearing for the plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

DEFENDANTS ASHLEY AND PHILIP DAVIS' MOTION TO AUGMENT EXPERT WITNESS LIST

The Court's tentative ruling is not contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendants Ashley and Philip Davis' motion to augment expert witness list to add Brian Doherty is denied. The premise of the motion is that defendants were surprised that plaintiff Rashni Singh's expert Dr. Lawrence Nordhoff testified at his deposition that he had opinions regarding biomechanics of the accident that is the subject of this case. However, a review of the papers filed by Ms. Singh in support of her ex parte application to substitute Dr. Nordhoff in place of her previously designated expert Dr. Winthrop Smith shows: 1) Ms. Singh's May 25, 2018 designation of Dr. Smith stated that Dr. Smith would provide opinions regarding "the forces, mechanics and dynamics of the subject collision"; 2) Dr. Nordhoff is an expert in "traffic accident reconstruction, biomechanics and injury causation analysis"; and 3) Dr. Nordhoff's curriculum vitae states his fields include "biomechanics." These papers establish that Ms. Singh had designated an expert in biomechanics more than three months ago and defendants were on notice that both Dr. Smith and Dr. Nordhoff were designated to testify about biomechanics of the accident that is the subject of this case. The Court signs a formal order.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Not Reported (302/HK)
